name: Medic
description: Healing is its own form of warfare. You've seen the worst of conflict, learned to patch up bodies and souls under the most extreme conditions. Your skills are a lifeline in a world of chaos. You've seen to many friends die due to the pants of a lord, now it's time to go help those who truly need help.

feats.name: Battle Medic
feats.description: You attempt to repair the **body** of a target and keep it from bleeding out any further. Make an **intellect** roll against the targets **body** to heal **Vitality** equal to your **intellect**. On **critical success**, you add 2d4. This can only be used once **long rest** per target.
